1: I will shew forth all thy marvellous works.
2: I will sing praise to thy name, O thou Most High.
3: They shall fall and perish at thy presence.
4: Thou satest in the throne judging right.
5: Thou hast put out their name for ever and ever.
6: And thou hast destroyed cities; Their memorial is perished with them.
7: He hath prepared his throne for judgment.
8: He shall minister judgment to the people in uprightness.
9: A refuge in times of trouble.
10: For thou, LORD LORD , hast not forsaken them that seek thee.
11: Declare among the people his doings.
12: He forgetteth not the cry of the humble.
13: Thou that liftest me up from the gates of death:
14: I will rejoice in thy salvation.
15: In the net which they hid is their own foot taken.
16: The wicked is snared in the work of his own hands. Higgaion. Selah. Higgaion. Selah.
17: And And all the nations that forget God.
18: The expectation of the poor shall not not perish for ever.
19: Let the heathen be judged in thy sight.
20: That That the nations may know themselves to be but to be but men. Selah. Selah.
